reviews.originalComment:
seprei jorok dan bernoda
tidak dapat handuk
air keruh
lantai jorok
tv tidak nyala
bocor 
terdapat laba-laba mati di tempat tidur
AC tidak dingin
not recommended, jangan pilih hotel ini, akan menyesal nanti
reviews.reviewComments:
dirty and stained sheets  
no towels  
murky water  
dirty floor  
TV not working  
leaking  
there is a dead spider on the bed  
AC not cold  
not recommended, do not choose this hotel, you will regret it later

reviews.originalComment: Pas udah check in dimintain tambahan biaya lagi, pdhal kan klo soal harga itu urusan pihak hotel sama apk, kalo gak masuk sama harga yg diberikan apk seharusnya gak usah dimaksukin ke apk. Kamar sudah tidak terawat, plavon banyak jamur, tv rusak, ac pun brisik sekali. Semoga diperbaiki lagi yaa
reviews.reviewComments: After checking in, they asked for additional fees, even though the price issue should be between the hotel and the app. If it doesn't match the price given by the app, it shouldn't be charged to the app. The room was not well-maintained, the ceiling had a lot of mold, the TV was broken, and the AC was very noisy. I hope it can be fixed.

reviews.originalComment: Perlengkapan kamar mandi kurang seperti sabun odol dan sikat gigi
reviews.reviewComments: Bathroom supplies are lacking, such as soap, toothpaste, and toothbrushes.
